title: Models
description: Model garments or other apparel and accessories for prospective buyers at fashion shows, private showings, or retail establishments. May pose for photos to be used in magazines or advertisements. May pose as subject for paintings, sculptures, and other types of artistic expression.

tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Record rates of pay and durations of jobs on vouchers.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Gather information from agents concerning the pay, dates, times, provisions, and lengths of jobs.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Report job completions to agencies and obtain information about future appointments.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Assemble and maintain portfolios, print composite cards, and travel to go-sees to obtain jobs.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Pose as directed, or strike suitable interpretive poses for promoting and selling merchandise or fashions during appearances, filming, or photo sessions.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Follow strict routines of diet, sleep, and exercise to maintain appearance.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Apply makeup to face and style hair to enhance appearance, considering such factors as color, camera techniques, and facial features.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Work closely with photographers, fashion coordinators, directors, producers, stylists, make-up artists, other models, and clients to produce the desired looks, and to finish photo shoots on schedule.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Dress in sample or completed garments, and select accessories.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
